prompt:
Design Style: clean-minimal, professional, with ample whitespace and modern sans-serif typography.
Color Palette: Primary green (#4CAF50) for accents and buttons, secondary dark grey (#333333) for text, light grey (#F0F0F0) for backgrounds, and a subtle light blue (#03A9F4) for complementary elements, evoking nature and calm.

SECCIÓN 1 - HERO (Above the Fold):
Layout: Centered content with a large, inviting background image of a beautiful, well-maintained garden or patio.
Headline (PAS): "¿Cansado de un patio sin vida? Transforma tu espacio exterior con JLC Outdoors Inc." in dark grey, bold, large font.
Subheadline: "Creamos paisajes y áreas al aire libre que amarás, aumentando el valor y disfrute de tu hogar." in dark grey, regular font, below the headline.
Primary CTA: A prominent, rounded button in primary green (#4CAF50) with white text: "Solicita tu Diseño Gratuito Ahora".
Trust Signal: Below the CTA, "Más de 10 años embelleciendo hogares en Orlando, FL." in a lighter grey.

SECCIÓN 2 - PRUEBA SOCIAL:
Layout: A grid layout displaying customer testimonials and a summary of achievements.
Headline: "Nuestros clientes están felices." in dark grey, centered.
Sub-section for reviews: "Hemos transformado más de 200 hogares y jardines con éxito. Ve lo que dicen:" with a placeholder for 3-star rating icons.
Placeholder for a short, compelling quote from a satisfied customer.

SECCIÓN 3 - BENEFICIOS (3 max):
Layout: Three distinct cards or sections arranged in a horizontal grid on desktop, stacking on mobile. Each card has a subtle green icon, a bold title, and a single line of benefit.
Benefit 1:
  Icon: A stylized green leaf icon.
  Title: Diseño Personalizado
  Description: "Creamos un plan único que se adapta perfectamente a tus sueños y presupuesto."
Benefit 2:
  Icon: A stylized green gardening shovel icon.
  Title: Instalación Profesional
  Description: "Nuestro equipo experto garantiza resultados duraderos y de la más alta calidad."
Benefit 3:
  Icon: A stylized green house with a garden icon.
  Title: Valor Agregado a tu Hogar
  Description: "Invierte en tu propiedad y disfruta de un oasis personal al aire libre."

SECCIÓN 4 - CTA FINAL:
Layout: A full-width section with a strong background color (subtle gradient of green/blue) and centered content.
Headline: "¿Listo para tener el jardín de tus sueños?" in white, bold, compelling.
CTA Button: A large, rounded button in primary green (#4CAF50) with white text, repeating: "Obtén tu Consulta Gratis".
Risk Reducer: Below the button, "Sin compromiso. Empecemos a diseñar tu espacio ideal hoy." in white.

SECCIÓN 5 - FOOTER:
Layout: Clean, minimal footer with contact information and social media links.
Content: "JLC Outdoors Inc. | Orlando, FL | info@jlcoutdoors.com | (555) 123-4567".
Social Media Icons: Placeholder for Facebook and Instagram icons.
Copyright: "© 2024 JLC Outdoors Inc. Todos los derechos reservados."

Mobile Responsiveness: The design must be fully responsive, ensuring an impeccable user experience on all mobile and desktop devices, with sections stacking vertically on smaller screens and images scaling appropriately.

mcpInstructions.step1: mcp_stitch_create_project({ title: "Lead Magnet - JLC Outdoors Inc." })

Color Palette: Primary green (#4CAF50) for accents and buttons, secondary dark grey (#333333) for te...", deviceType: "DESKTOP" })
